headline: Hasbro Posts Strong Preliminary Q1 Results, Reiterates 2026 Outlook
summary: HAS reports strong preliminary Q1 growth, driven by MAGIC: THE GATHERING, and reaffirms its 2026 outlook.

headline: Top S&P500 movers in Friday's pre-market session
summary: As we await the opening of the US market on Friday, let's delve into the pre-market session and discover the S&P500 top gainers and losers shaping the early market sentiment.

headline: Morgan Stanley Maintains Overweight on Hasbro, Raises Price Target to $122
summary: Morgan Stanley  analyst Megan Alexander   maintains Hasbro (NASDAQ:HAS) with a Overweight and raises the price target from $119 to $122.

headline: Hasbro expects March cyberattack to impact second-quarter revenue
summary: The toy maker is reviewing files and working to fully bring certain systems back online. The company will incur some costs related to the investigation.
